input.headline: World Cup play-off draw recap - Ireland to face Czechs

raw.headline: World Cup play-off draw recap - Ireland to face Czechs

winner: Ireland will be facing the Czechs in a game that is sure to bring a fresh meaning to the term 'Czechmate'.

candidates.text: Why was Ireland so confused after the World Cup play-off draw? Because they didn't know whether to fear the Czechs or check their Czechers.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 7.5, "reason": "The joke is clever with a pun on 'Czechs' and 'checkers,' but the setup could be tighter for maximum impact."}

candidates.text: Ireland will be facing the Czechs in a game that is sure to bring a fresh meaning to the term 'Czechmate'.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 9.5, "reason": "Smart wordplay with 'Czechmate' (a pun on 'checkmate'), specific to the teams mentioned, concise, and highly surprising in a natural way."}

candidates.text: Why did the Irishman bring a Czech dictionary to the World Cup? Because he heard there'd be some unpronounceable names on the team!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat specific to the headline but relies on a generic pun about pronunciation rather than leveraging the actual teams or context of the World Cup play-off draw."}

candidates.text: Why did the Irishman bring a map to the soccer game against the Czechs? Because he heard they were checking passports at the gate!
